headings: BROWNSTONE CONSTRUCTION, LTD. SUBCONTRACT FOR Allegra at Shreveport
text: - 3.8. Subcontractor  shall  submit  a  schedule  of  values  fairly  allocating  the  Subcontract  Sum  among identifiable portions of the Subcontract Work based upon the cost of such work (segregate values for abatement and demolition work, if any) for approval by Contractor which shall be used as the basis of monthly payments to the
